---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 


***SENATE ANALYSIS 2026 primary***
```{r}
library(tidyverse) 
library(janitor) 

senate_candidates <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/CNS-annapolis-sam-gauntt/2026_GP_statesenatorbydistrict_candidatelist.csv") |> clean_names()

senate_candidates_count <- senate_candidates |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> 
  mutate(senate_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(senate_district) |> count(senate_district) |> rename(num_candidates = n)

write.csv(senate_candidates_count, file ="senate_candidates_count.csv") 


#party totals

senate_party_count <- senate_candidates |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> 
  mutate(senate_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(senate_district) |> count(senate_district, office_political_party) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = office_political_party,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) 

```


***HOUSE ANALYSIS 2026 primary***
```{r}
house_candidates <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/CNS-annapolis-sam-gauntt/2026_GP_houseofdelegatesbydistrict_candidatelist.csv") |> clean_names() 


house_candidates_count <- house_candidates |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> count(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number) |> mutate(
    district_num = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number),
    district_letter = stringr::str_extract(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number, "[A-Z]")
  ) |> arrange(district_num, district_letter) 

write.csv(house_candidates_count, file ="house_candidates_count.csv") 

house_party_count <- house_candidates |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> 
  mutate(house_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(house_district) |> count(house_district, office_political_party) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = office_political_party,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) 

```

***SENATE 22 PRIMARY***
```{r}
senate_candidates_22 <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/CNS-annapolis-sam-gauntt/gen_cand_lists_2022_6.csv") |> clean_names()

senate_candidates_count_22 <- senate_candidates_22 |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> 
  mutate(senate_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(senate_district) |> count(senate_district) |> rename(num_candidates = n)

write.csv(senate_candidates_count_22, file ="senate_candidates_count.csv") 


#party totals

senate_party_count_22 <- senate_candidates_22 |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> 
  mutate(senate_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(senate_district) |> count(senate_district, office_political_party) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = office_political_party,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) 

```



***HOUSE 22 PRIMARY***
```{r}
house_candidates_22 <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/CNS-annapolis-sam-gauntt/gen_cand_lists_2022_7.csv") |> clean_names() 


house_candidates_count_22 <- house_candidates_22 |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> count(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number) |> mutate(
    district_num = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number),
    district_letter = stringr::str_extract(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number, "[A-Z]")
  ) |> arrange(district_num, district_letter) 

write.csv(house_candidates_count_22, file ="house_candidates_count.csv") 

house_party_count_22 <- house_candidates_22 |> filter(candidate_status == "Active") |> 
  mutate(house_district = readr::parse_number(contest_run_by_district_name_and_number)) |> 
  arrange(house_district) |> count(house_district, office_political_party) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = office_political_party,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) 

```
